summary: Bound the live full-doctor subprocess probes that were able to hang fixture validation, preserving warning JSON instead of blocking the doctor.

optimization_proof.single_lever: Add timeout envelopes and warning JSON fallbacks to orch_capture_parity_doctor_json and fleet_three_surface_drift_json.

validation.command: targeted timeout branches: orch timeout, orch timeout-bin-missing, fleet aggregate timeout

behavior_contract: If the orch capture parity probe times out, doctor emits status=warn with warning=orch_capture_parity_probe_timeout and timeout_seconds.
If timeout is unavailable for orch capture parity, doctor emits status=warn with warning=orch_capture_parity_timeout_bin_missing instead of running unbounded.
If fleet three-surface drift exceeds the aggregate timeout, doctor emits status=warn with warning code fleet_three_surface_drift_timeout and zero drift counts.
Storage override semantics are unchanged: active, expired, wrong-target, auto-clear, CLI, and env threshold checks still pass.
boundaries: This is a full-substrate local runtime repair in /Users/josh/.claude, not a public reduced-mode installer change.
The /Users/josh/.claude source commit is local and not pushed because that repository already has a large unrelated private worktree state.
No unrelated dirty files in /Users/josh/Developer/flywheel were modified.
